summary: Frontend testing of new Inbox and Calendar pages. Both pages load correctly with all UI elements present. However, backend API calls fail with 404 'Client not found' errors due to user_id mismatch - endpoints don't use role-based access pattern.

critical.issue: Returns 404 'Client not found' for org_admin users accessing clients created by other users. Uses user_id exact match instead of get_accessible_user_ids()
Returns 404 'Client not found' for org_admin users. Same root cause - uses user_id exact match
Returns 404 'Client not found' when creating follow-up. Uses user_id exact match instead of get_accessible_user_ids()

integration_issues.issue: Cannot view conversation history due to backend 404 error
Cannot send messages due to backend 404 error
Cannot create follow-ups due to backend 404 error

action_items: Fix /api/contacts/{client_id}/chains endpoint to use get_accessible_user_ids() instead of exact user_id match
Fix /api/contacts/{client_id}/send-sms endpoint to use get_accessible_user_ids() instead of exact user_id match
Fix POST /api/followups endpoint to use get_accessible_user_ids() instead of exact user_id match
critical_code_review_comments: Multiple backend endpoints use 'user_id': current_user['user_id'] for client lookup instead of using the role-based access pattern with get_accessible_user_ids(). This breaks functionality for org_admin and team_leader roles who should have access to clients created by their team members.

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend bugs prevent full testing
success_rate.frontend: 80% - UI loads correctly, but integrations fail due to backend issues

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints need to be fixed to use get_accessible_user_ids() for role-based access. After fix, retest: 1) Inbox conversation view, 2) Inbox send message, 3) Calendar create follow-up

inbox_page_load.description: Inbox page loads with client list, search, stage filter, refresh button

inbox_search.description: Search filters clients by name (e.g., 'John' shows 2 results)

inbox_stage_filter.description: Stage filter dropdown shows all stages and filters correctly

inbox_client_selection.description: Clicking client shows conversation view UI, but chains API returns 404

inbox_send_message.description: Send button works but API returns 404 'Client not found'

inbox_quick_templates.description: Quick template buttons visible (Follow up, Payment Reminder), but sending fails

calendar_page_load.description: Calendar page loads with stats cards (Overdue, Today, This Week, Completed)

calendar_month_navigation.description: Prev/Next month and Today buttons work correctly

calendar_day_selection.description: Clicking a day selects it and shows follow-ups for that day

calendar_create_followup.description: Dialog opens with all fields, but saving returns 404 'Client not found'

navigation_inbox.description: Inbox link in sidebar navigates to /inbox correctly

navigation_calendar.description: Calendar link in sidebar navigates to /calendar correctly

root_cause_analysis.issue: Backend endpoints don't respect role-based access for org_admin users
root_cause_analysis.fix_required: Use get_accessible_user_ids() like other endpoints: accessible_ids = await get_accessible_user_ids(current_user); client = await db.clients.find_one({'id': client_id, 'user_id': {'$in': accessible_ids}})
